user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of notice period rules with their duration, applicable locations, departments and position levels, so that I can review notice period policies.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notice Period screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing notice period name, duration, employee class specific, location(s), department(s) and position level(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter notice period rules by location, department and position, so that I can quickly find the rules relevant to a specific group.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notice Period screen; When I select location, department and/or position filters and click Search; Then only matching notice period rules are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the notice period search filters, so that I can start a new search from a clean state.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied notice period filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new notice period rule, so that I can define notice durations for specific locations, departments and position levels.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notice Period screen; When I click Add new notice period and provide the name, duration and applicable scope; Then the rule is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing notice period rule, so that I can keep notice policies aligned with organizational changes.
acceptance_criteria: Given a notice period rule exists; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next configuration step after setting notice periods, so that I can continue the exit setup workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured notice periods; When I click Next; Then I advance to the next step
